title: gbrain #430: mixed-case slugs must be canonicalized before import writes
summary: For gbrain issue 430 / PR 828, importFromContent must validateSlug the slug before existing page lookup and all transaction writes. Otherwise putPage writes the lowercase slug but later tx calls like upsertChunks can que
body:
For gbrain issue #430 / PR #828, importFromContent must validateSlug the slug before existing-page lookup and all transaction writes. Otherwise putPage writes the lowercase slug but later tx calls like upsertChunks can query the original mixed-case slug. Also normalize direct upsertChunks in both PGLite and Postgres engines so it matches putPage behavior.
Evidence: Fixed in PR #828 for issue #430. Changed src/core/import-file.ts, src/core/pglite-engine.ts, src/core/postgres-engine.ts, and test/pglite-engine.test.ts. Regression covers mixed-case import and mixed-case direct upsertChunks.
Verified by: bun test test/pglite-engine.test.ts; bun run typecheck; git diff --check
